title: Customise Holidays/Non Working days for account
excerpt:
Currently the Holiday days are not customizable on Monday.com. 
There should be an option to customize the holiday days for an account so that those days are not part of the timeline and holidays observed aren’t counted …

posts.author: Abhijitk1991 (Abhijit Khadapkar)
posts.cookedHtml:
Currently the Holiday days are not customizable on Monday.com.
There should be an option to customize the holiday days for an account so that those days are not part of the timeline and holidays observed aren’t counted in the amount of days it takes for each step/task to get completed.
In this case we can also update the bank holidays in our country or a Non working day for our office.
A setting to be done in account settings should work in this case.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey @Abhijitk1991,

Can you let me know if our recent update on the existing feature request is along the lines of what you’re looking for?

posts.author: Abhijitk1991 (Abhijit Khadapkar)
posts.cookedHtml: Hi Bianca, I checked both the feature requests and they are the same. You may mere them

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: A post was merged into an existing topic: Setting non work days in Monday
